description: Context compile -> commit-message generation adapter -> typed artifact (commit-message.schema.v1.json). PR-B6 write-lite runtime for master plan item #20. The bundled flow produces the TYPED COMMIT MESSAGE ARTIFACT only; applying the actual git commit is an operator-downstream concern. ao-kernel NEVER executes git commit itself (commit_write capability is prohibited in agent-adapter-contract.schema.v1.json). expected_adapter_refs declares 'codex-stub' for deterministic CI; production workspaces point at a real commit-message-capable adapter whose manifest declares commit_message in capabilities[] and carries an output_parse rule pointing at commit-message.schema.v1.json.
